steps.title: Identify the requirement
steps.content: The question explicitly asks to “emphasize the location.” This is the sole criterion for the correct answer.

steps.title: Match to the location-centered choice
steps.content: Choice D emphasizes location by making Mexico City and Mexico the centerpiece of the sentence: “Those wishing to see Casa Luis Barragán in person will have to travel to Mexico City, Mexico.” Choices A, B, and C omit location, instead highlighting the architect, architectural features, or design style. That matches choice D — D is correct.
